name_en: Buddhist Statues and Related Items of Ryushakuji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the Buddhist statues and related items of Ryushakuji temple. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 1975-11-29. It is located in Tateishi.

A tangible cultural property, a statue of the reclining Shakyamuni (nirvana image). It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 1985-04-01. It is located in Nishihirai.

name_en: Square Stone Pillar with Cap-Stone and Guidepost
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a square stone pillar with a cap-stone, serving also as a guidepost (dohyo). It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 1985-04-01. It is located in Shinozuka.

name_en: Festival Handscroll of Fuji Sengen Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the festival handscroll (emaki) of Fuji Sengen Shrine. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 1987-04-01. It is located in Fujioka.

name_en: Stone Stupa Slab of Aoi Hachiman
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the stone stupa slab (itabi) of Aoi Hachiman. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 1990-04-01. It is located in Hongo.
A tangible cultural property, the thousand Buddha statues of Kanai. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 1991-04-01. It is located in Kanai.

name_romaji: Den Yamanouchi Uesugi Akisada ko aiyo no goban
name_en: Go Board Traditionally Attributed to Lord Yamanouchi Uesugi Akisada
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a go board traditionally attributed to Lord Yamanouchi Uesugi Akisada. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 1994-08-01. It is located in Shimonohino.

name_en: Sixteen Characters from the Hoben Chapter in Nichiren's Own Hand
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sixteen characters from the Hoben chapter written in Nichiren's own hand. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 1997-06-01. It is located in Fujioka.

name_romaji: Shotengu mae no itabi oyobi Hokyoin-to
name_en: Stone Stupa Slab and Hokyoin Pagoda before Shoten Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the stone stupa slab (itabi) and Hokyoin pagoda in front of Shoten Shrine. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 2001-04-25. It is located in Shimonohino.

name_en: Set of Tile-Making Tools of the Iwata Family
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a set of roof-tile-making tools of the Iwata family. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 2003-10-27. It is located in Nakakurisu.

A tangible cultural property, a tile-maker's license and an official commission tablet (goyofuda). It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 2003-10-27. It is located in Nakakurisu.
A tangible cultural property, the sorinto pillar of Johoji temple. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 1984-04-01. It is located in Johoji.

name_en: Bunei-Era Stone Stupa Slab of Fukujiji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the Bunei-era stone stupa slab (itabi) of Fukujiji temple. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 1984-04-01. It is located in Oniishi.

name_en: Bunna-Era Stone Stupa Slab of Sakurayama
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the Bunna-era stone stupa slab (itabi) of Sakurayama. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 1984-04-01. It is located in Sanbagawa.

name_en: Bunmei-Era Stone Stupa Slab of Yuzurihara
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the Bunmei-era stone stupa slab (itabi) of Yuzurihara. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 1984-04-01. It is located in Yuzurihara.

name_en: Memorial Pagoda of Zen Master Docho
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the memorial pagoda of the Zen master Docho. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 1985-11-01. It is located in Johoji.
A tangible cultural property, the temple bell (bonsho) of Tenyoji. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 2006-03-01. It is located in Hobi.

name_en: Four Suits of Armor of Fuji Sengen Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property, four suits of armor (gusoku) of Fuji Sengen Shrine. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 2009-06-25. It is located in Fujioka.

name_romaji: Takayama Chogoro kudokuhi tsuki seimon kifusha meiban
name_en: Merit Monument of Takayama Chogoro with Main Gate and Donor Name Board
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the merit monument of Takayama Chogoro together with the main gate and a donor name board. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 2014-06-25. It is located in Hongo.

name_en: Commemorative Virtue Monument of Machida Kikujiro
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the commemorative virtue monument of Machida Kikujiro. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 2014-06-25. It is located in Hongo.

name_romaji: Suwa Jinja (Suwa-sama) otoko mikoshi (Yasaka-sama) onna mikoshi
name_en: Male Portable Shrine (Suwa-sama) and Female Portable Shrine (Yasaka-sama) of Suwa Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the male portable shrine (Suwa-sama) and female portable shrine (Yasaka-sama) of Suwa Shrine. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important cultural property, designated on 2018-10-24. It is located in Fujioka.

A tangible cultural property, the night festival of Mishima-sama. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important folk cultural property, designated on 2002-05-20. It is located in Nishihirai.

A tangible cultural property, the lion dance (shishimai) of Hie Shrine. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important folk cultural property, designated on 1994-07-01. It is located in Johoji.

A tangible cultural property, the Oniishi Misugi drumming (taiko). It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important folk cultural property, designated on 1994-07-01. It is located in Oniishi.

A tangible cultural property, the Oniishi festival music (matsuribayashi). It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important folk cultural property, designated on 2001-01-24. It is located in Oniishi.

name_en: Lion Dance of the Mikaboyama Fudo Deity
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the lion dance (shishimai) of the Mikaboyama Fudo deity. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important folk cultural property, designated on 2003-03-24. It is located in Sanbagawa.

name_en: Lion Dance of Mori Iidama Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the lion dance (shishimai) of Mori Iidama Shrine. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as an important folk cultural property, designated on 2025-03-26. It is located in Mori.
A monument (historic site), the Kizozuka burial mound (kofun). It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as a historic site, designated on 1968-04-23. It is located in Shiroishi.
A monument (historic site), the Kokubunji tile kiln site. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as a historic site, designated on 1968-04-23. It is located in Kanai.
A monument (historic site), the grave of Kikukawa Eizan. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as a historic site, designated on 1968-04-23. It is located in Fujioka.
A monument (historic site), the Totsuka Shrine burial mound (kofun). It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as a historic site, designated on 1970-04-15. It is located in Kamitotsuka.
A monument (historic site), the Reifuden burial mound (kofun). It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as a historic site, designated on 1970-04-15. It is located in Fujioka.
A monument (historic site), the Hiraji Shrine burial mound (kofun). It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as a historic site, designated on 1970-04-15. It is located in Nakaotsuka.
A monument (historic site), the Horikoshizuka burial mound (kofun). It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as a historic site, designated on 1970-04-15. It is located in Shiroishi.
A monument (historic site), the Haji crossroads (tsuji). It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as a historic site, designated on 1971-04-16. It is located in Hongo.
A monument (historic site), the Suwa burial mound (kofun). It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as a historic site, designated on 1974-03-26. It is located in Fujioka.
A monument (historic site), the Tatara archaeological site. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as a historic site, designated on 1974-03-26. It is located in Shimonohino.
A monument (historic site), the Dozuka Inari burial mound (kofun). It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as a historic site, designated on 1985-04-01. It is located in Okanogo.
A monument (historic site), the Kanda district group of burial mounds (kofun). It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as a historic site, designated on 2016-07-26. It is located in Kanda.
A monument (historic site), the site of Nakaotsuka Castle. It is municipally designated by Fujioka City as a historic site, designated on 2020-11-18. It is located in Nakaotsuka.
